economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 7x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
falsifiers: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Predictable cash-flow security). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AAL, including mid-cycle network operations, AAdvantage co-brand optionality, net financial claims, and cycle/leverage reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating network cash is valued once; cash, debt, co-brand option, and cycle reserve are separate additive components with unique overlap keys.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q filing extracts; GAAP net income is cross-check only for levered airline.

component_groups.label: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
component_groups.economic_claim: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
component_groups.economic_claim: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-brand and partner mile contracts renew over 3 to 7 years; base case assumes continued monetization through FY2030.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from industry loyalty precedents; American does not disclose standalone AAdvantage segment economics in SEC filings.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Partner-funded mile sales require no incremental owner capital in base case.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

component_groups.label: Fuel, recession, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Fuel, recession, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $54633.0M, OCF $3099.0M, cash $902.0M, total debt $29007.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
